title: PS-69087 Phase 10: harden uploader pipeline FileShare assertions
body:
## Summary

Phase 10 of the PS-69087 FileShare test coverage epic. Hardens **Indirect → Direct** coverage on the DMS uploader pipeline with explicit FileShare-side assertions (file present in `FMSDirectory`, staging file removed from `WebFileUploadDirectory`, etc.) per [`docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/test-coverage.md`](docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/test-coverage.md) rows #67, #69, #70, #73, #74.

| # | Method | Where | FileShare assertion |
|---|--------|-------|---------------------|
| 67 | `ProjectSightDMSService.CreateFiles` | `_Foundation/FMS/Files.cs` (`UploadFilePS` helper) | New `AssertFilePersistedToFMS` post-condition makes every PS upload assert `File.Exists(FMSDirectory + uploadedFile.GUID)` |
| 69 | `ProjectSightDMSService.CheckinFile` | `FileLibrary/FileTests.cs` → `Files_CreateNewVersion_PersistsNewContentToFMS` | New version GUID lands in `FMSDirectory`; `FileVersionID` increments |
| 70 | `DMSUploader.PreProcessFilesAsync` | `FileLibrary/FileTests.cs` → `Files_Upload_MovesStagedFileFromUploadDirToFMS` | Snapshots upload dir before/after; asserts FMS gains the file while upload dir gains nothing |
| 73 | `StoredFile.Store` / `StoreAndKeepOriginalFile` | `Spec Management/SpecSetFromFMS.cs` → `StoreAndKeepOriginalFile_CopiesToFMS_AndStorePathMovesFromUploadDir` | Stages two upload-dir files; verifies `Store` moves source out and `StoreAndKeepOriginalFile` retains it; both produce FMS copy |
| 74 | `DMSSystem.CreateDMSFileForAPIInternalAsync` | `FileLibrary/FilesAPIControllerTests.cs` → `CreateDMSFileForAPIInternalAsync_StoresStagedFileInFMSDirectory` | Stages a file in `WebFileUploadDirectory`, calls the internal API entry directly, asserts staged file removed and FMS file present |

## Tracking

- [x] `docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md` — Phase 10 checkbox flipped with method-level summary table.
- [ ] `docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist` — **no update needed**; every test class touched (`FileLibrary.FileTests`, `FileLibrary.FilesAPIControllerTests`, `SpecManagement.SpecSetFromFMS`, plus the broadly-used `UploadFilePS` helper consumers) is already included in the existing playlist's `<Rule Name="Includes">` block.

## Test plan

Focused tests for the touched classes only (no broad/end-to-end suite runs):

- [ ] `dotnet test ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FileLibrary.FileTests.Files_Upload_MovesStagedFileFromUploadDirToFMS"`
- [ ] `dotnet test ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FileLibrary.FileTests.Files_CreateNewVersion_PersistsNewContentToFMS"`
- [ ] `dotnet test ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FileLibrary.FilesAPIControllerTests.CreateDMSFileForAPIInternalAsync_StoresStagedFileInFMSDirectory"`
- [ ] `dotnet test ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests --filter "FullyQualifiedName~SpecManagement.SpecSetFromFMS.StoreAndKeepOriginalFile_CopiesToFMS_AndStorePathMovesFromUploadDir"`
- [ ] Existing `FileLibrary.FilesAPIControllerTests.UploadFileByValidFileDataShouldReturnOkAndUpload` (regression for the new `UploadFilePS` post-condition)
- [ ] Existing `SpecManagement.SpecSetFromFMS.UserCanUploadSpecSetIntoFMS` (regression for the staging helper next to the new test)

> Local build is blocked by a pre-existing environmental NuGet feed issue (NU1101 `TrimbleCloud.FileService` on a private Trimble GitHub feed not configured on this workstation). CI build/test will validate compilation and runtime behaviour.

## References

- Plan: `C:\Users\acollin\.cursor\plans\ps-69087_coverage_plan_86b29422.plan.md` — Phase 10 section.
- Conventions followed: [`docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md`](docs/ai/INTEGRATION_TEST_CONVENTIONS.md) (MSTest v3 + FluentAssertions, `TestBase`/`RecordTestBase`, `Generate*RequestedBy*`, `_dbHelperFactory.NewDBHelperPortfolio`, `AssertionScope` after null-guard, helper-based cleanup).
author: AdamCollins

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

This PR is Phase 10 of PS-69087’s FileShare test coverage epic, strengthening “Indirect → Direct” coverage for the DMS uploader pipeline by adding explicit on-disk FileShare assertions (FMS persistence and upload-dir cleanup) and documenting progress/architecture notes for the TFS migration prep effort.

**Changes:**
- Added new/expanded integration tests that assert expected FileShare side effects (file persisted to `FMSDirectory`, staged upload file removed, new version persisted).
- Hardened the shared `UploadFilePS` helper to assert the uploaded file is physically present in `FMSDirectory`.
- Added/updated TFS-prep documentation (filesystem primer + coverage progress tracker + inventory formatting fixes).

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 5 out of 5 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/PS-69093-write-methods.md | Formatting/encoding cleanup in FileShare write-methods inventory. |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/PS-69089-read-methods.md | Formatting/encoding cleanup in FileShare read-methods inventory. |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/existing-filesystem-overview.md | New primer explaining current FileShare directory structure and path flow. |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md | New phase checklist/progress tracker and Phase 0 notes/evidence. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Spec Management/SpecSetFromFMS.cs | New test asserting `StoredFile.Store` vs `StoreAndKeepOriginalFile` FileShare side effects. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/FileLibrary/FileTests.cs | New tests asserting uploader pipeline moves staged file to FMS and persists new versions. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/FileLibrary/FilesAPIControllerTests.cs | New test asserting internal API upload moves staged file to FMS and removes staged artifact. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/_Foundation/FMS/Files.cs | `UploadFilePS` now asserts the uploaded file is present on disk in `FMSDirectory`. |
</details>
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.body: New test method name uses underscores, which is inconsistent with the rest of this file’s test naming (e.g., UserCanUploadSpecSetIntoFMS) and with the integration test naming guidance. Rename it to a PascalCase sentence without underscores for consistency (e.g., StoreAndKeepOriginalFileCopiesToFmsAndStoreMovesFromUploadDir).
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: Test method name introduces underscores, which is inconsistent with the surrounding naming style in this class and with the documented integration test naming convention. Rename to a PascalCase sentence without underscores for consistency.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This test stages a physical file in WebFileUploadDirectory but doesn’t guarantee cleanup if CreateDMSFileForAPIInternalAsync throws or an assertion fails before the staged file is removed. Add a try/finally that always deletes the stagedPath (and, if needed, any created FMS artifact) to avoid leaving debris that can impact later tests.
review_comments.author: Copilot

files.patch:
@@ -56,6 +56,19 @@
 
 ### Phase 10 — Harden uploader pipeline assertions (Indirect → Direct)
 
+Hardened coverage for methods #67, #69, #70, #73, #74 with explicit FileShare-side assertions:
+
+| Method | # | Test class | FileShare assertion added |
+|--------|---|------------|---------------------------|
+| `ProjectSightDMSService.CreateFiles` | 67 | `_Foundation/FMS/Files.cs` (`UploadFilePS` helper) | Every PS upload now asserts `File.Exists(FMSDirectory + uploadedFile.GUID)` via new private `AssertFilePersistedToFMS` helper |
+| `ProjectSightDMSService.CheckinFile` | 69 | `FileLibrary/FileTests.cs` — `Files_CreateNewVersion_PersistsNewContentToFMS` | New version GUID lands in `FMSDirectory`; `FileVersionID` increments versus the initial upload |
+| `DMSUploader.PreProcessFilesAsync` | 70 | `FileLibrary/FileTests.cs` — `Files_Upload_MovesStagedFileFromUploadDirToFMS` | Snapshots `WebFileUploadDirectory` before/after upload; asserts the new FMS path exists and the upload dir gained no new files |
+| `StoredFile.Store` / `StoreAndKeepOriginalFile` | 73 | `Spec Management/SpecSetFromFMS.cs` — `StoreAndKeepOriginalFile_CopiesToFMS_AndStorePathMovesFromUploadDir` | Stages two upload-dir files; asserts `Store` removes the staged source while `StoreAndKeepOriginalFile` retains it; both produce the FMS copy |
+| `DMSSystem.CreateDMSFileForAPIInternalAsync` | 74 | `FileLibrary/FilesAPIControllerTests.cs` — `CreateDMSFileForAPIInternalAsync_StoresStagedFileInFMSDirectory` | Stages a file in `WebFileUploadDirectory`, calls the internal API entry directly, asserts the staged file is removed and the file lands in `FMSDirectory` |
+
+No new test classes were added (assertions and methods are additions to existing files), so `PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist` requires no update — every test class touched is already covered by the existing playlist's `FileLibrary.FileTests`, `FileLibrary.FilesAPIControllerTests`, and `SpecManagement.SpecSetFromFMS` includes.
+
+- [x] Phase 10 — explicit FileShare assertions added (#67, #69, #70, #73, #74)
 - [ ] Phase 10 PR merged
 
 ---
